name_cn:
Chane1🌈24A Handmade Series Enamel Clasp Mini CF AS4973
Double C logo on the flap. The chain features a colorful enamel clasp that is adjustable, adding a touch of elegance to the look. It exudes a luxurious and unique temperament. Simply too beautiful.
Size: 11×18×5.5cm
